text: (DMS) & Snowball @ nasianinrin © srrcrs e Larger migrations might be multi-TB in size e ... moving data over networks takes time and consumes capacity * DMS can utilise snowball ... e Step 1: Use SCT to extract data locally and move to a snowball device e Step 2 : Ship the device back to AWS. They load onto an S3 bucket. e Step 3 : DMS migrates from S3 into the target store ¢ Step 4 : Change Data Capture (CDC) can capture changes, and via S3 intermediary they are also written to the target database
